scriptText:
I. PART 1 [DEJA VU BY I'MIN]

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic K-Pop music video featuring @actor as EVAN, an acrobatic lead dancer. Format: Sentimental laid-back beat. Sync pacing, lip-syncing, and mood strictly to @music.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Ensure all editing, rapid multi-angle cuts, and choreography strictly follow the 78 BPM rhythm and cues of @music. Maintain spatial continuity and stable body orientation across the rapid-cut sequence, ensuring match-on-action feels cohesive despite the angle shifts. Prioritize grounded physics during acrobatic flips. Avoid any fade-to-black, dimming, or signaling of the end; the final frame must be a hard, abrupt cut.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Location: Crowded, narrow Itaewon street at night, wet pavement, vivid glowing storefronts.
- Wardrobe: Evan wears an oversized reflective silver bomber jacket, black baggy cargo pants, and chunky white sneakers (starkly contrasting the background extras).
- Styling/Makeup: Glass skin, subtle smoked eyes, wet-look textured dark hair, silver chain.
- Lighting: Maximum drama via high-contrast directional neon, piercing cyan and magenta rim lights, deep cinematic shadows.
- Camera/VFX: Authentic anamorphic lens flares, dynamic handheld tracking, rhythmic editing synced to @music.
- Continuity state: Evan remains center-axis, jacket slightly unzipped, hands free for acrobatics.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, low angle, tracking backward down the wet Itaewon street. Evan stands frame-center, facing the lens, his silver jacket gleaming under a magenta neon sign. He maintains intense eye contact, posture relaxed but poised for movement, as background extras blur out of focus in the depth of field.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, tracking backward -> [ACT] Evan strides forward, lip-syncing smoothly, rolling his shoulders into a laid-back groove -> [AUDIO] "Let's talk about it,"
[CAM] MCU, dynamic push-in -> [ACT] He points briefly toward the lens, stepping into a fluid pop-and-lock isolation -> [VFX] A subtle cyan anamorphic flare sweeps across the lens
[CAM] CU, low angle, camera-left of axis -> [ACT] Evan snaps his head toward the lens, jaw tight, freezing his motion -> [AUDIO] "late"
[CAM] CU, high angle, camera-right of axis -> [ACT] He instantly shifts his weight, leaning forward with piercing eye contact -> [AUDIO] "night"
[CAM] MCU, profile, tracking left -> [ACT] He lifts his right hand mimicking holding a phone, lip-syncing aggressively -> [AUDIO] "FaceTime"
[CAM] Dutch angle, low, dead center -> [ACT] He drops his hand, chest popping forward heavily on the beat -> [AUDIO] "Whole time"
[CAM] MS, direct overhead angle -> [ACT] He throws both arms wide, looking straight up into the rain-slicked camera -> [AUDIO] "on fire,"
[CAM] FS, fast sweeping ORBIT L-R -> [ACT] Evan drops smoothly into a rapid back handspring across the wet pavement, silver jacket trailing -> [AUDIO] "damn right"
[CAM] MCU, tracking backward -> [ACT] He lands flawlessly, immediately locking eyes with the lens and lip-syncing with a confident smirk -> [AUDIO] "I'm sipping on you"
[CAM] WS, low angle lockoff -> [BLOCK] Crowd remains blurred in the background -> [ACT] He launches into a sweeping acrobatic butterfly kick, staying centered in frame -> [AUDIO] "Let's talk about it,"
[CAM] CU, handheld, tracking right -> [ACT] He recovers from the kick seamlessly, wiping his bottom lip with his thumb, maintaining the sentimental groove -> [AUDIO] "late night"
[CAM] ECU, dead center -> [ACT] Extreme eye contact, micro-expressions of longing as he articulates the lyrics -> [AUDIO] "FaceTime"
[CAM] FS, fast pull-back -> [ACT] He explodes upward into a high aerial twist, illuminated by flashing neon -> [AUDIO] "Whole time on fire,"
[CAM] MS, slight low angle -> [ACT] He lands perfectly in a low, intense crouch, staring dead into the lens without blinking -> [AUDIO] "damn right I'm sipping on you" -> [TRANS] Hard, abrupt cut. No fade.
[</BRIEF>]

II. PART 2 [GLORIOUS BY ADELYN PAIK]

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic K-Pop music video snippet starring @actor as ROSA, portraying a 2020s Dreamy Sentimental style. Sync visuals, rhythm, and emotion strictly to @music.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Pacing, editing, and rapid cuts must be driven entirely by the 116 BPM tempo of @music. Ensure spatial continuity within the enclosed train car location, maintaining Rosa's axis and the screen direction of the passing lights. Precise lip-sync timing is critical and must align seamlessly with the lyrical cues from @music. Maintain an abrupt, hard cut on the final frame—absolutely no fade to black or dimming.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Location: Vintage train car interior at night, city lights passing by windows.
Palette: Deep melancholic blues and purples, punctuated by warm amber.
Lighting: Maximum drama; neon side-lighting from windows, soft amber rim light, anamorphic lens flares.
Wardrobe: Oversized distressed denim jacket draped off the left shoulder, flowy white silk blouse, delicate silver layered necklaces.
Styling: Dewy glass skin, subtle tear-drop glitter under the eyes, soft wind-blown wavy hair.
VFX/Motion: Cinematic light leaks, floating dust motes, natural handheld sway mixed with smooth tracking.
Audio Vibe: @music drives a dreamy, nostalgic atmosphere.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MCU, tracking slowly forward. Rosa sits in the window seat, camera-left. She gazes out the window, right hand resting on the cool glass. Dramatic neon blue light washes over her profile, highlighting the glitter under her eye as the train moves forward.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU, tracking slowly forward. -> [ACT] Rosa gazes out the window, right hand on glass, profile illuminated by passing blue neon. -> [AUDIO/VFX] Instrumental intro, floating dust motes.
[CAM] CU, 45-degree angle. -> [ACT] She turns her head slowly toward the camera, dropping her right hand from the glass. ROSA (lipsync): "이전에 내가 아니야" -> [AUDIO/VFX] Light leak flashes across the lens.
[CAM] MS, low angle. -> [ACT] She stands up in the aisle, the denim jacket slipping slightly further off her left shoulder. -> [AUDIO/VFX] "난 돌아가지 않아"
[CAM] ECU, rapid cut to her eyes. -> [ACT] A sharp reflection of a passing amber streetlight flashes vividly across her pupil. -> [AUDIO/VFX] Rapid drum beat transition.
[CAM] WS, tracking backward down the aisle. -> [ACT] She walks slowly forward toward the camera, surrounded by empty seats. -> [AUDIO/VFX] "공허했었던"
[CAM] MCU, handheld, front view. -> [ACT] She looks down, a melancholic expression, hair blowing gently from an unseen breeze. -> [AUDIO/VFX] "그 수많은"
[CAM] CU, frontal. -> [ACT] She looks up, making direct eye contact with a soft, bittersweet smile. ROSA (lipsync): "밤을 말이야" -> [AUDIO/VFX] Subtle tracking push-in.
[CAM] OTS, over an empty seat frame-right. -> [ACT] She stops walking and reaches her left hand out into the empty space in front of her. -> [AUDIO/VFX] "아무도 없던 내게"
[CAM] CU, isolated on her hand. -> [ACT] Warm amber light suddenly hits her outstretched fingers, creating a stark contrast against the blue shadows. -> [AUDIO/VFX] "따스히"
[CAM] MCU, tracking left. -> [ACT] She pulls her left hand to her chest, breathing in deeply as if comforted. ROSA (lipsync): "다가와준" -> [AUDIO/VFX] 00:10 / Smooth, continuous motion.
[CAM] EWS, high angle from the end of the train car. -> [ACT] The entire car is suddenly flooded with warm golden light, entirely dissolving the melancholic blue neon. -> [AUDIO/VFX] 00:12 / "그 모든"
[CAM] ECU, tight on her face. -> [ACT] She closes her eyes softly as a single tear catches the golden light. ROSA (lipsync): "의미를" -> [AUDIO/VFX] 00:13 / Hard, abrupt cut on the final beat (no fade, no dim).
[</BRIEF>]

III. PART 3 [LIKE ONE OF US (CLEAN VERSION) BY DAJANA]

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic pop music video snippet featuring @actor as LEA, driven entirely by the hopeful, sentimental rhythm and mood of @music.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
The primary audio source is strictly @music; all editing, pacing, and camera motion must perfectly follow its 120 BPM rhythm. Maintain strict spatial and prop continuity for LEA's hand and head accessories across all 7 cuts. End the sequence with a hard, abrupt cut—strictly avoid any dimming, fade-out, or transition to black.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Audio Anchor: @music (120 BPM, Pop, Hopeful, Sentimental)
- Environment: An artistic, realistic outdoor setting—a vast, sunlit mirrored desert salt flat reflecting a pastel sky.
- Lighting: Maximum drama golden-hour backlighting, casting long shadows and a luminous rim light on the subject.
- Palette: Thematic and sentimental—soft peach, lavender, and muted gold.
- Wardrobe: Casual but expressive—a flowy, sand-colored oversized linen suit.
- Styling: Wide-brimmed bohemian hat, layered necklaces, and chunky silver rings on both hands.
- Camera/Edit: Varied cinematic compositions, natural handheld motion, cutting precisely on the vocal beats.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
LEA stands center frame on the reflective salt flat, facing camera-left, bathed in intense golden-hour backlighting. She wears the sand-colored oversized suit, the wide-brimmed hat, and chunky silver rings. Her right hand lightly touches the brim of her hat as she stares thoughtfully toward the horizon.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] WS, LOW ANGLE, profile against the pastel sky -> [ACT] LEA remains center, facing camera-left, right hand resting on her hat's brim as the wind gently catches her oversized suit -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] "Been thinking of"
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, crossing the axis to face her -> [ACT] LEA lowers her right hand, showing the silver rings, and turns her head to look directly into the lens -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] LEA (lipsync): "Who I am"
[CAM] CU on hands, HIGH ANGLE -> [ACT] LEA's hands clasp together at her waist, her thumbs anxiously touching the chunky silver rings -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] "Am I enough"
[CAM] MS, TRACKING IN -> [ACT] LEA lifts her chin, her gaze locking intensely with the camera, shoulders squared in a confident stance -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] LEA (lipsync): "If I'm not a man"
[CAM] EWS, DRONE VIEW, pulling back and up -> [ACT] LEA pivots and walks slowly away from the camera, her silhouette and hat reflecting perfectly on the salt flat below -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] "Cuz I've been caught / In between"
[CAM] MCU, PROFILE, tracking alongside her -> [ACT] LEA continues walking right-to-left across the frame, looking up toward the fading sun -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] LEA (lipsync): "The masculine / And feminine"
[CAM] ECU on LEA's eyes, LOCKOFF -> [ACT] LEA stops, turns her face perfectly toward the lens, her expression shifting to raw vulnerability as she holds unbroken eye contact -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] LEA (lipsync): "What does it even mean"
[</BRIEF>]

IV. PART 4 [LIKE THAT BY DASLOE, I'MIN, SEON]

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic K-pop music video snippet starring @actor as EVAN, a charismatic lead dancer/rapper. Restless, high-energy, and hopeful. Paced perfectly to the rhythm and energy of @music.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Ensure all visual cuts, dynamic camera movements, and choreographic beats synchronize flawlessly with the 111 BPM rhythm of @music. Maintain strict spatial continuity across rapid cuts, keeping the main axis anchored to the performance space. Track hand gestures, body orientation, and microphone/prop mimicry accurately. Prioritize high-drama lighting contrast and authentic atmospheric VFX.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
- Location: Abandoned concrete warehouse retrofitted with vertical LED light tubes and an overhead laser rig.
- Lighting: Maximum drama; high-contrast cyberpunk palette (electric blue, vivid magenta, stark white strobes), deep shadow falloff.
- Wardrobe: Blue hoodie layered under a structured metallic-black techwear jacket, silver chains, dark cargo pants, chunky sneakers.
- Styling: Textured, kinetic hair with a slight sheen of sweat.
- Editing: Fast-paced, relentless, cut sharply to the track's tempo.
- VFX: Authentic anamorphic lens flares, subtle atmospheric smoke.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
A low-angle MCU of Evan in the dim, smoke-filled warehouse, facing camera-left. He wears the blue hoodie and metallic jacket, catching a faint magenta rim light. He stands perfectly still, head slightly bowed, hands resting at his sides, as a solitary overhead white spotlight pierces the haze.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] Low angle MCU, PUSH IN fast -> [ACT] Evan abruptly snaps his head up, catching the harsh white spotlight in his eyes -> [AUDIO] "You a"
[CAM] CU, handheld, tracking right -> [ACT] He glares into the lens, thrusting his right index finger forward -> [LIPSYNC] "jack of all trades"
[CAM] MS, low angle -> [ACT] He throws his arms wide open, stepping forward into a sudden electric blue neon wash -> [LIPSYNC] "Master of everything"
[CAM] ECU on his eyes -> [ACT] A confident, restless smirk breaks across his face as the lighting pulses -> [AUDIO] "The baddest,"
[CAM] CU, high contrast side-lighting -> [ACT] He aggressively shakes his head side to side -> [LIPSYNC] "no debate"
[CAM] WS, low angle, anchored center -> [ACT] He slides backward smoothly across the concrete floor, body loose and fluid -> [AUDIO] "Feeling like I got"
[CAM] MCU, locked -> [ACT] He grips the lapel of his techwear jacket with his left hand, popping his chest forward -> [LIPSYNC] "nothing to lose"
[CAM] MS, orbiting left -> [ACT] He traces a slow, rising line in the air with his right hand, tracking it intensely with his eyes -> [AUDIO] "There you ignited the fuse"
[CAM] Dutch angle MCU, fast push -> [ACT] He crouches slightly, building visible tension in his shoulders and jaw -> [LIPSYNC] "It's about to blow up"
[CAM] FS, wide and centered -> [ACT] He jumps, executing a sharp, explosive full-body expansion as the background LEDs flash blinding white -> [LIPSYNC] "ka boom"
[CAM] ECU, profile shot from camera-right -> [ACT] He quickly wipes his mouth with his right thumb, adjusting his posture -> [LIPSYNC] "Ehem check,"
[CAM] MS, pulling backward -> [ACT] He marches aggressively toward the lens, waving his left hand outward dismissively -> [LIPSYNC] "attention everybody"
[CAM] Low angle WS -> [ACT] He drops sharply to one knee, right arm resting on his thigh, chin lifted high in arrogance -> [AUDIO] "shows respect"
[CAM] MS, locked off -> [ACT] Standing up in a blur, he launches into rapid, intricate hip-hop footwork -> [AUDIO] "Look at them moves"
[CAM] MCU, dynamic tilt up -> [ACT] He isolates his shoulders, delivering a sharp, rhythmic shimmy while stepping frame-right -> [LIPSYNC] "Shimmy makes some room"
[CAM] CU, fast zoom in -> [ACT] He suddenly stops moving, forming a precise finger-gun with his right hand, aiming directly at the lens -> [AUDIO] "Make a"
[CAM] ECU on his face and right hand -> [ACT] He drops the imaginary hammer with a sharp thumb flick, holding a dead-eyed, intense stare directly into the glass -> [LIPSYNC] "shot"
[</BRIEF>]

V. PART 5 [DEJA VU BY I'MIN]

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a K-pop Music Video Snippet featuring @07d6bd29-7987-4b5f-a03e-d5930fc6b592 as EVAN, a soloist performer. The tone is sentimental yet laid-back, featuring rhythmic dance and rapid-cut inserts synchronized to a 78 BPM beat. Utilizing @music as the primary reference for pacing, mood, and synchronization.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize match-on-action during dance sequences to ensure fluid motion across cuts. Ensure the "late night" blue-and-amber lighting remains consistent. Maintain the position of the silver ring on Evan’s right hand and the damp texture of his hair across all 14 shots. Avoid any fade-outs; ensure the final shot remains high-energy until an abrupt cutoff.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Reference: Anchored by the rhythmic beats and sentimental tone of @music.
Lighting Theory: Maximum drama using high-contrast "Cyan-Moonlight" rim lights and "Warm Amber" key lights to mimic a city-view loft at night.
Color Palette: Deep indigo, charcoal, and electric amber highlights.
Character Wardrobe: Oversized charcoal satin button-down (top buttons undone), loose black tailored trousers, and a singular silver band on the right ring finger.
Character Styling: "Wet-look" hair swept back slightly, soft smoky eye makeup, and hydrated skin texture.
Environment Detail: A modern high-rise loft with floor-to-ceiling windows, soft city bokeh in the background, a minimalist velvet sofa, and a smartphone glowing on a glass table.
Camera Motion: Gliding gimbal movements for dance beats; static, sharp focus for rapid-cut inserts.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, LOW ANGLE, centered on EVAN -> [STATE] Evan stands in the center of the dark loft, backlit by blue city lights, chin down, arms relaxed at his sides -> [ENV] Soft hum of a city night, distant bass thumping.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, PUSH IN -> [ACT] Evan begins a fluid, wave-like dance move, sliding his feet across the polished floor -> [AUDIO] Beat starts: "Let's talk about it..."
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD -> [ACT] Evan looks directly into the lens, lip-syncing with a lazy, charismatic smile -> [STATE] Right hand brushes through his hair.
[CAM] INS, CU, STATIC -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 1: "late"] A digital bedside clock flips from 01:59 to 02:00 -> [LIGHT] Red glow.
[CAM] INS, WS, TILTING -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 2: "night"] The city skyline blurred into soft, shimmering bokeh.
[CAM] INS, CU, TOP-DOWN -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 3: "FaceTime"] A smartphone on a glass table illuminates with an incoming call UI.
[CAM] INS, ECU, STATIC -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 4: "Whole time"] A match striking, a small flame erupting in the dark.
[CAM] INS, MCU, REFLECTION -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 5: "on fire"] Evan’s silhouette reflected in the window glass, overlaid by a warm orange light flare.
[CAM] MS, TRACKING R -> [ACT] Evan catches the rhythm, performing a sharp shoulder pop and body roll -> [AUDIO] "...damn right I'm sipping on you."
[CAM] MCU, LOW ANGLE -> [ACT] Evan tilts his head back, mimicking the motion of drinking, his throat moving rhythmically.
[CAM] MS, ORBIT L -> [ACT] Evan spins into a new dance position, his satin shirt catching the amber light -> [AUDIO] "Let's talk about it..."
[CAM] INS, CU, STATIC -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 6: "late"] Evan's silver ring catching a glint of light as he snaps his fingers.
[CAM] INS, ECU -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 7: "night"] Evan’s eye dilating in the dark, reflecting the blue moonlight.
[CAM] INS, CU, TOP-DOWN -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 8: "FaceTime"] The phone screen flickering, casting a blue light upward.
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD -> [ACT] [Rapid Cut 9: "on fire"] Evan pulls the collar of his shirt slightly, looking into the lens with intense, sentimental eyes -> [STATE] Skin shows light perspiration.
[CAM] MS, CENTERED -> [ACT] Evan completes a final sharp dance freeze, one hand reaching toward the camera, eyes locked on the lens -> [AUDIO] Full beat drop -> [TRANS] Abrupt cut to black.
[</BRIEF>]
